body.title: [sprint] Consequence check: skill telemetry signal vs noise
body.description:
**What changed:** Per-skill telemetry contracts + violation logger added.
**Predicted unintended effects:** Violation log grows without bound if not rotated; forget-flag definitions may be too broad (everything fires) or too narrow (nothing fires); metric postconditions may not reflect actual skill quality.
**Signals to watch:** violation_log.jsonl size after 30 days; top_violations() result — is the list stable (good signal) or rotating every run (noise)?
**Gate condition:** Check 30 days after T-skill-telemetry-rollup closes.

**Affected files:** None — observation only
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** Observe; annotate outcome as signal/noise/partial and close
**Test plan:** no tests — observation ticket
